business.name: Veterans Electrical SC
business.tagline: Licensed electrician serving Charleston with military precision

hero.headline: When the power's out, *Matt answers*
hero.subheadline: 5-star Charleston electrician who shows up fast, works clean, and gets it right the first time.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every wire, outlet, and panel
services_section.subheading: From quick fixes to complete rewires, handled with military precision

services.title: Outlet Installation & Repair
services.description: New outlets where you need them, old ones that work like new. No more extension cords running across your kitchen.

services.title: Ceiling Fan Installation
services.description: Proper mounting, balanced blades, and airflow that actually makes a difference. We know HVAC systems too.

services.title: Emergency Electrical Repair
services.description: Power out at midnight? Sparking outlet? We drop everything and get there fast with fully stocked trucks.

services.title: Panel Upgrades & Rewiring
services.description: Upgrading old electrical systems to handle today's power demands safely and up to code.

services.title: Power Line Installation
services.description: Running new circuits for ovens, AC units, and high-power appliances. Clean work, no shortcuts.

about.heading: Matt — Your Charleston Electrician
about.body: Veterans Electrical SC means one guy you can count on — Matt. Military trained, Charleston based, and answering calls at all hours. Whether it's a ceiling fan install or an emergency repair, you get the same careful attention to detail. Licensed, insured, and backed by 83 five-star reviews from neighbors who've been there.

reviews.name: Jermaine R.
reviews.text: Matt showed up exactly on time, diagnosed the problem fast, and his pricing was completely fair. Professional and knowledgeable — definitely calling him for all electrical work.

reviews.name: Kendall O.
reviews.text: Matt ran a new power line for our oven and fixed outlets that kept cutting power to our fridge. Helpful, kind, and excellent work. Recommending him to everyone.

reviews.name: Michael M.
reviews.text: Had outlets replaced and installed. Very happy with Matt's work and would highly recommend to others.

reviews.name: Robert F.
reviews.text: Called him late at night for an emergency while I was out of town. He dropped everything, rushed over, and fixed what builders messed up. Quick, professional, explained everything clearly.

cta.heading: Ready to get the power back on?
cta.body: Call now for same-day service, or request a free quote for your electrical project. Licensed, insured, and ready to help.
